name: VirusTotal
description: Look up VirusTotal's existing analysis report for a file hash without uploading file content.

auth.hint: Copy your VirusTotal API key and send it in the x-apikey header.

tools.name: get_file_report
tools.description: Retrieve an existing VirusTotal File object by hash.

params.name: id
params.description: SHA-256, SHA-1, or MD5 file hash.
